# Antigravity Directory

> The #1 resource directory for Google Antigravity IDE. Free. No login required.

Antigravity Directory lists 3,160+ curated MCP servers, rules, prompts, skills, and workflows for developers building with Google Antigravity IDE (formerly Google Project IDX with Gemini).

## What is Google Antigravity IDE?

Google Antigravity IDE is Google's AI-native development environment powered by Gemini. It supports MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers, agentic workflows, and AI-assisted coding via rules and prompts.

## Categories

- MCP Servers (/mcp-servers) — Model Context Protocol server implementations for Antigravity
- Rules (/rules) — Coding rules and behaviour guidelines for the Antigravity AI agent
- Prompts (/prompts) — System prompts and prompt templates optimised for Gemini
- Skills (/skills) — Antigravity skill definitions for agentic tasks
- Workflows (/workflows) — Automated workflow configurations for development pipelines

## Resource Pages

Each resource is at /t/[slug] and includes:
- Title and full description
- Source URL (GitHub or official site)
- Category
- Full content (rules text, prompt text, MCP config) in copyable format
- Tags

## Sitemap

https://googleantigravity.directory/sitemap.xml — 3,160+ URLs indexed

## Advertising

Sponsors reach developers actively building with Google Antigravity IDE.
Contact: directoryantigravity@gmail.com
Advertise: https://googleantigravity.directory/advertise
